detail: Automatically scraped from SB Acoustics website (scraped 2026-06-24). T/S parameters have not been verified by a human against the datasheet.
corrections: Re-scraped to fix HTML entity bug: – was not decoded before parse_number, causing 8211 to be parsed as field values (Qts=Qes=Qms=8211 or Cms=Vas=8.211). Fix applied 2026-06-25.
